heading: Definitions
label: 621 Definitions
notes: Purpose, , , provided that:Pub. L. 114–318, § 2130 Stat. 1608Dec. 16, 2016“The purpose of this Act [see , set out as a Short Title of 2016 Amendment note under ] is to increase the efficiency and effectiveness of the Federal Government in managing property of the Federal Government by—section 1 of Pub. L. 114–318section 101 of this title“(1)requiring the United States Postal Service to take appropriate measures to better manage and account for property;“(2)providing for increased collocation with Postal Service facilities and guidance on Postal Service leasing practices; and“(3)establishing a Federal Real Property Council to develop guidance on and ensure the implementation of strategies for better managing Federal property.”

L. 114–318section 101 of this title“(1)requiring the United States Postal Service to take appropriate measures to better manage and account for property;“(2)providing for increased collocation with Postal Service facilities and guidance on Postal Service leasing practices; and“(3)establishing a Federal Real Property Council to develop guidance on and ensure the implementation of strategies for better managing Federal property.”

children.heading: .—Administrator
children.label: 1 .—Administrator
children.text: The term “Administrator” means the Administrator of General Services.

children.heading: .—Council
children.label: 2 .—Council
children.text: The term “Council” means the Federal Real Property Council established by section 623(a).

children.heading: .—Director
children.label: 3 .—Director
children.text: The term “Director” means the Director of the Office of Management and Budget.

children.label: A
children.text: an executive department or independent establishment in the executive branch of the Government; or

children.label: B
children.text: a wholly owned Government corporation (other than the United States Postal Service).

children.heading: .—Field office
children.label: 5 .—Field office
children.text: The term “field office” means any office of a Federal agency that is not the headquarters office location for the Federal agency.

children.heading: .—Postal property
children.label: 6 .—Postal property
children.text: The term “postal property” means any property owned or leased by the United States Postal Service.

children.heading: .—Public-private partnership
children.label: 7 .—Public-private partnership
children.text: The term “public-private partnership” means any partnership or working relationship between a Federal agency and a corporation, individual, or nonprofit organization for the purpose of financing, constructing, operating, managing, or maintaining one or more Federal real property assets.

children.label: A
children.text: irregularly or intermittently by the accountable Federal agency for program purposes of the Federal agency; or

children.label: B
children.text: for program purposes that can be satisfied only with a portion of the property.
